blockingIssues.description: `tests/streaming_state_machine_contract.rs:135` only checks the pre-terminal accumulator state in `interleaved_reasoning_text_and_tool_indices_stay_isolated` and never consumes the queued `response.completed` event or asserts `final_response()`, so it does not prove terminal reconciliation preserves reasoning/text/tool isolation.

`tests/streaming_state_machine_contract.rs:228` only checks pre-terminal multimodal assembly in `multimodal_content_parts_remain_isolated_until_completion` and never advances through `response.completed` or asserts `final_response()`, so VAL-STREAM-015 remains only partially proven.
